description: Deterministic strategy engine over WorkerRush/LightRush/HeavyRush/RangedRush delegates with map-size-adaptive phase thresholds and an opponent-build counter table for 16x16+ play. Ollama advisor is consulted every ~500 ticks (or on phase change) with an 80ms read timeout and a circuit breaker so a stalled model can't blow the per-tick budget.
